message:
feat(telemetry): add credential broker audit and snapshot normalization

Extend UnifiedTelemetryRecord with two new constructors that normalize
connector credential-broker events into the shared telemetry schema:

from_credential_audit(CredentialAuditEvent):
- Maps credential broker audit events (lease issue, renewal, revocation,
  rotation, validation failures, etc.) to unified records
- Hashes sensitive identifiers (credential_id, connector_id, lease_id)
  rather than including raw values
- Redacts detail text (preserves character count only)
- Derives health_tier and failure_class from event type and outcome
- Sets sensitivity=Restricted with appropriate redaction strategy

from_credential_broker_snapshot(CredentialBrokerTelemetrySnapshot):
- Maps periodic broker health snapshots to unified records
- Includes counter rollups (leases_issued, revocations, renewals,
  validation_failures, etc.)
- Derives health_tier from active lease count and failure ratios
- Sets sensitivity=Internal since snapshots contain only aggregates

Supporting helpers:
- credential_audit_record_id: deterministic record ID from event fields
- credential_audit_correlation_id: correlation from connector+credential
- credential_audit_scope_id: scope from connector or credential ID
- credential_audit_health_tier: severity mapping by event type
- credential_audit_failure_class: failure classification
- credential_provider_status_label: extract provider status from detail
- credential_broker_snapshot_failure_class: snapshot-level classification
- stable_hash/enum_string: shared formatting utilities

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
